task_completion.description: draw.io application is opened to create the diagram.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The draw.io (diagrams.net) interface is visible on the screen with a blank or partially complete diagram.

task_completion.description: The diagram includes 7 branches with the specified colors.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 7 distinct branch lines or areas: main (Blue), develop (Green), 3 feature branches (Orange), 1 release branch (Purple), and 1 hotfix branch (Red).

task_completion.description: Labeled commits are present and arranged chronologically from left to right.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Nodes or shapes representing commits are placed along the branch lines, progressing from left to right to indicate the flow of time.

task_completion.description: Version tags and proper merge arrows are included in the diagram.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for text or labels for version tags (v2.3.1, v2.3.2, v2.4.0) on the main branch, and arrows connecting different branches to represent merges (e.g., feature to develop, release to main/develop).

task_completion.description: The source file is saved as 'gitflow_release.drawio' in the 'Diagrams' directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, file manager window, or the draw.io title bar shows the file named 'gitflow_release.drawio' located in the '~/Diagrams' folder.

task_completion.description: The diagram is exported as a PNG image named 'gitflow_release.png' in the 'Diagrams' directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog, file manager window, or terminal shows the file 'gitflow_release.png' successfully created in the '~/Diagrams' folder.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the draw.io GUI to build the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent dragging and dropping shapes, changing colors, and connecting nodes within the draw.io interface.

integrity.description: The PNG file was exported using draw.io's export feature.
integrity.visual_evidence: The draw.io 'Export as' dialog or menu should be visible in the screenshots, rather than the agent using a command-line tool to convert the file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The diagram must contain exactly 7 branches: main (Blue #2196F3), develop (Green #4CAF50), feature/user-preferences (Orange #FF9800), feature/payment-retry (Orange #FF9800), feature/audit-logging (Orange #FF9800), release/2.4.0 (Purple #9C27B0), and hotfix/2.3.2 (Red #F44336). It must include 3 version tags: v2.3.1, v2.3.2, v2.4.0. There should be 10 commits arranged left-to-right. Files must be saved to /home/ga/Diagrams/ as gitflow_release.drawio and gitflow_release.png.
